title: bufonia duvaljouvei subsp. gottelandii
intro: Bufonia duvaljouvei subsp. gottelandii, also known as a type of shrub in the Plumbaginaceae family, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
